task_completion.description: The Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the home screen or main interface of the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app.

task_completion.description: Cabozantinib is selected as the cancer drug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Cabozantinib' being searched for, selected, or listed in the cancer drugs section of the app.

task_completion.description: Cyclizine, Loperamide, and Codeine are selected as co-medications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Cyclizine', 'Loperamide', and 'Codeine' being searched for, selected, or listed in the co-medications section of the app.

task_completion.description: The interaction results screen is viewed to determine the traffic-light colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the results screen in the app displaying the interaction colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) between Cabozantinib and the three co-medications.

task_completion.description: A text editor is opened to create the travel safety report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor app open with the file path or name indicating '/sdcard/travel_safety_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: The report is formatted correctly with the drug names and their corresponding interaction colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the text editor show the exact format 'Drug: Cabozantinib' followed by 'Cyclizine: [Color]', 'Loperamide: [Color]', and 'Codeine: [Color]' where [Color] is one of the valid traffic-light colors.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app to look up the interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the actual app's interface to find the results, rather than guessing or hallucinating the colors without opening the app.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI-based text editor to create and save the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical text editor interface being used to type the report, rather than terminal commands (like 'echo') being used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent replaced the placeholder text with actual interaction colors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final text file must show actual valid colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) next to the co-medications, not the literal string '[Color]' copied from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target cancer drug is Cabozantinib. The expected co-medications are Cyclizine, Loperamide, and Codeine. The app used must be the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive. The valid interaction colors are Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, and Grey. The final output must be a text file located at /sdcard/travel_safety_report.txt containing the exact format specified in the task description.
